creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text: While the current port is at 1.8.9.1, there is a pending update for 1.8.10 at bug #201365. I have just now done a test compile inside of a FreeBSD 10 amd64 poudriere jail and it builds without error. I cannot say why 1.8.9.1 fails to build. But I would like to request this bug be closed as invalid because it will be invalid once the port is updated.
